activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of the Story
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the theme and message of the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify the central theme of technology in education
Write a detailed explanation of the message of the story in 12–15 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking and analytical writing

activities_projects.title: Character Comparison Essay
activities_projects.objective: Analyze differences between Margie and Tommy
steps: Write a short essay comparing Margie and Tommy
Explain their attitudes toward school and learning
Support your ideas with examples from the story

activities_projects.title: Education System Debate
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate traditional and future education systems
steps: Prepare points supporting traditional schools
Prepare points supporting mechanical schools
Write a conclusion stating which system is better and why

activities_projects.title: Technological Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the impact of technology on learning
steps: Research how technology is used in modern classrooms
Compare it with Margie's mechanical school
Write a short report of 10–12 sentences

activities_projects.title: Creative Story Extension
steps: Imagine what happens after Margie goes to school
Write the next part of the story in about 12–15 sentences
Include interaction with the mechanical teacher

activities_projects.title: Theme Exploration Activity
activities_projects.objective: Explore the theme of human interaction in learning
steps: Identify scenes where Margie shows dislike for school
Explain how human teachers and classmates might change her experience
Write your ideas in 8–10 sentences

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Creation
steps: Write a conversation between Margie and a teacher from the past
Include questions about books, classrooms, and classmates
Write at least 12 lines of dialogue

activities_projects.title: Literary Elements Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify literary elements in the story
steps: Identify setting, characters, and plot of the story
Explain how the futuristic setting influences the story
Write your explanation in 8–10 sentences

activities_projects.title: Future Education Model Design
activities_projects.objective: Design an improved future education system
steps: Create a model of a future classroom combining technology and human teachers
Label the features such as smart boards, AI tools, and teachers
Write a short explanation of your design

activities_projects.title: Reflective Writing
activities_projects.objective: Reflect on the importance of human teachers
steps: Think about your own school experience
Compare it with Margie's school
Write a reflection in 10–12 sentences
